---
title: "KRAT DATA WRANGLING!!!!"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## RAW DATA!!!

```{r}
#installed readxl packages with #install.packages("read.xl")
install.packages("tidyverse")
install.packages("read.xl")
install.packages("Rtools")
library(readxl)
table1 <- read_excel("postnovRAWkratdata.xlsx")
```
